title: Hilton - Tayles (Execution - 1)
partnershipCategories: Networking Apps, Co-Working, Productivity Software, Business News, Mobility, Fintech.
about: Tales for Tayles March presents a mid-week platform for brands to anchor in Gurugram's professional and community networks. More than a hotel bar activation, it offers strategic access to bleisure elites through "The Cabinet of Tayles"—Wednesday networking where NFC coasters unlock stories and business development happens without conference rooms. Through curated integrations and invisible-layer access, brands can drive engagement with traveling decision-makers who own Wednesday night. The format supports premium spirits, business networking platforms, and NFC tech seeking professional-audience relevance. Partnering here positions brands as enabling the connections that close deals.

Perfect for beauty, sleepwear, and wellness brands seeking deep emotional connection and "girl gang" virality.
